subcodes.first_line: The sweet waters of life have streamed forth from the Pen of the All-Merciful. Blessed is he who hath drunk thereof, and woe betide every heedless and remote one [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد جری ماء عذب الحیوان من قلم الرحمن طوبی لمن شرب و ویل لکل غافل بعید قد ظهر
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @living waters; water of life, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
